divisional_charts_marriage.description: Comprehensive guide to divisional charts (Vargas) used in marriage astrology
divisional_charts_marriage.methodology: Vedic astrology uses multiple divisional charts for specific life areas - marriage primarily uses Navamsa (D9)

d1_rashi.name: Rashi Chart (D1)
d1_rashi.significance: Foundation chart showing overall life pattern
d1_rashi.marriage_usage: Basic 7th house analysis for marriage and spouse

d9_navamsa.name: Navamsa Chart (D9)
d9_navamsa.division_method: Each 30-degree sign divided into 9 portions of 3°20' each
d9_navamsa.significance: Most important divisional chart for marriage predictions
d9_navamsa.importance_note: Many Vedic astrologers never predict Rashi chart without Navamsa chart

calculation_method.step1: Get Lagna chart or D1 chart
calculation_method.step2: Divide each sign (30 degrees) into nine portions of 3°20'
calculation_method.step3: Aries Navamsa: Aries to Sagittarius (9 signs)
calculation_method.step5: Place planets in respective Navamsa signs
calculation_method.step6: Find Navamsa Lagna based on D1 Lagna degrees

rtn.name: RTN Chart
rtn.description: Important derivative chart for spouse prediction

ntr.name: NTR Chart
ntr.description: Important derivative chart for spouse prediction

navamsa_house_meanings.description: Detailed significance of each house in Navamsa for marriage analysis

first_house.name: Navamsa Lagna (1st House)
first_house.spouse_insight: General happiness and fortune through marriage

second_house.name: 2nd House of Navamsa
significations: What we have or will have

gender_specific.for_man: Whether wife would be housewife or working woman

seventh_house.name: 7th House of Navamsa
seventh_house.special: Can give information about appearance of spouse

ninth_house.name: 9th House of Navamsa
ninth_house.additional: Can give insight into father's fortune

vargottama.name: Vargottama Navamsa
vargottama.definition: Planet in same zodiac sign in Rashi chart and Navamsa chart
vargottama.significance: Planet becomes as capable as being in own sign
vargottama.marriage_importance: Vargottama planets in 7th house or related to marriage give strong results

pushkar_navamsa.name: Pushkar Navamsa
pushkar_navamsa.definition: Specific degrees in Navamsa that are highly auspicious
pushkar_navamsa.marriage_importance: Planets in Pushkar Navamsa give excellent marriage results

analysis_method.step1: Analyze D1 (Rashi) chart 7th house for basic marriage potential
analysis_method.step2: Check D9 (Navamsa) chart for confirmation and details
analysis_method.step3: Compare 7th lord positions in both charts
analysis_method.step4: Check for Vargottama planets related to marriage
analysis_method.step5: Analyze Navamsa houses 1, 2, 7, 8, 11 for marriage quality
analysis_method.step6: Use RTN and NTR charts for additional insights
analysis_method.step7: Confirm with Dashas (planetary periods) for timing

interpreting_marriage.description: How to interpret marriage from Lagna and Navamsa charts

happy_marriage: 7th house/lord strong in both D1 and D9

other_vargas.description: Other divisional charts occasionally used in marriage analysis

saptamsa_d7.name: Saptamsa (D7)
saptamsa_d7.marriage_relevance: Used when analyzing family planning and children in marriage

dasamsa_d10.name: Dasamsa (D10)
dasamsa_d10.marriage_relevance: Analyzing spouse's career or impact of marriage on career

divisional_charts_marriage.source: aaps.space - Navamsa Chart, Divisional Charts, and Marriage Astrology
